_comment: Category metadata for stickers, templates and designs. Images placed in stickers/<id>/ or templates/<id>/ are turned into CDN URLs and attached to that category. Emojis (stickers only) are listed inline. Quotes live in quotes.json. Editable 'designs' are full posters: each item has a JSON layout file designs/<catId>/<id>.json and a full-composite thumbnail designs/<catId>/<id>.png (both produced by the app's dev 'Save as template' export). Optional `premium` lists which items (emoji chars or image filenames) require a rewarded ad to unlock; for designs `premium` is a per-item boolean.
